headline: Work With Us
snippet: GIVEMESPORT is one of the world’s largest independent sports media publishers. We cover news, features, and interviews across a broad range of sports, from football to MMA, catering our content to a g
full_text: GIVEMESPORT is one of the world’s largest independent sports media publishers. We cover news, features, and interviews across a broad range of sports, from football to MMA, catering our content to a global audience of more than 30 million fans each and every month. We’re looking for Content Creators to join the team and help create sports-related videos for our social media channels. The ideal candidates will be able to produce high-quality, engaging and trendy video content that resonates with our 26 million+ passionate fans and followers. Your Responsibilities Create short-form and long-form video content for various social media platforms (e.g., Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Twitter, etc.). Edit videos, add captions, graphics, music, and other effects to enhance engagement. Collaborate with the social media team to develop a content calendar that aligns with key sporting events and trends (e.g., key match days, transfer windows etc.) Stay up-to-date with sporting news and viral trends...
